title: Component Spec — Validated Input Contract
description: Every component brief fed to the AI agent pipeline MUST conform to this schema. The agent validates this BEFORE generating a JSON plan and BEFORE making any Figma MCP call. Any validation failure stops the pipeline — report the error and wait for a corrected brief.

_sources.Section 9: Agent system prompt rules — agentRules block
_sources.resolved-tokens.json: All token values must exist here before use

component.description: PascalCase component name. Becomes the Figma frame/component-set name.

description.description: One sentence describing the component purpose and primary usage context.

variants.description: Variant axes. Each entry becomes a Figma variant property value.

sizes.description: Supported sizes. Drives which padding/font-size tokens are applied.

states.description: Interactive states. Each becomes a Figma variant value. 'default' is always required.

autolayout.description: Auto-layout config. Values MUST use token alias format {token.path}. No raw px values. Cross-reference auto-layout-rules.json for per-component defaults.

direction.description: Primary axis direction — horizontal for buttons/inputs, vertical for cards/panels.

padding.description: Token alias for padding applied to all sides, e.g. {spacing.padding.M}

paddingVertical.description: Optional override for top/bottom padding only.

gap.description: Token alias for itemSpacing between children.

alignment.description: Primary axis alignment. Maps to Figma primaryAxisAlignItems.

counterAlignment.description: Counter-axis alignment. Maps to Figma counterAxisAlignItems.

sizing.description: hug = shrink to content | fill = expand to parent | fixed = set explicit width/height

tokens.description: Token assignments for this component. All values are dot-path keys from resolved-tokens.json. The agent resolves these to final hex/px before any MCP call.

background.description: Fill token path for light mode.

backgroundDark.description: Fill token path for dark mode. Omit if same as background.

text.description: Text color token path for light mode.

textDark.description: Text color token path for dark mode.

border.description: Border width token path. Omit if no border.

borderColor.description: Border color token path for light mode.

borderColorDark.description: Border color token path for dark mode.

shadow.description: Shadow token path. Use shadow.none for flat surfaces.

minWidth.description: Min-width token path. Required when sizing = hug and component has a minimum.

height.description: Fixed height token path. Required when sizing = fixed.

naming.description: Figma layer naming template. Must follow ComponentName/{variant}/{size}/{state}. Axes not applicable to a component may be omitted.

layerNaming.description: Naming convention for all child layers inside the component. From Section 10 of the design brief.

breakpoints.description: Target breakpoints. If omitted, defaults to Desktop/L only.

page.description: Target Figma page name. Agent verifies page exists before executing. Creates it if missing.

section.description: Target Figma section/frame name within the page. Agent screenshots page first to find clear space.

referenceScreenshot.description: Optional path to reference image used by vision agent for visual verification.

agentRules._source: Brief Section 9 — AI Agent System Prompt
agentRules.description: These 5 rules are hard constraints. The agent must apply them for every component, every run.

rules.rule: Never use hardcoded hex values, pixel values, or font sizes.
rules.enforcement: All values must be dot-path references resolved against resolved-tokens.json before any Figma MCP call. If a path is not found in resolved-tokens.json, STOP and report the missing token.

rules.rule: Before making any Figma MCP call, output the complete component JSON plan and wait for confirmation.
rules.enforcement: Agent outputs the full plan, prints WAITING FOR CONFIRMATION, and takes no MCP action until the user replies 'proceed' or provides corrections.

rules.rule: After creating the component, take a screenshot and verify it matches the spec.
rules.enforcement: If verification fails, output exactly what is wrong and re-attempt. Max 3 attempts. On 3rd failure, output ESCALATE TO HUMAN and stop.

rules.rule: All layers must use auto-layout. No absolute positioning unless explicitly specified.
rules.enforcement: Every frame and group must have a direction, padding, gap, and sizingMode set. Reference auto-layout-rules.json for the component's defaults.

rules.rule: Follow the naming convention: ComponentName/Variant/Size/State for components, label--{purpose} for text layers, icon--{position} for icon slots.
rules.enforcement: Agent validates all layer names against the naming template in this spec before committing to Figma.

qualityGates._source: Brief Section 4 — Quality gates (all must pass before publish)
qualityGates.description: Three automated checks run after Figma MCP execution. All three must pass before the component is marked ready for human review.

gates.name: Visual Diff
gates.description: Screenshot the created component and compare against the spec (and referenceScreenshot if provided).
passCriteria: Padding and gap are visually consistent with token values
All variant states are present and visually distinct
Text is readable and uses correct font family (Zoho Puvi)
gates.failAction: Increment retry counter. Output diff notes. Re-attempt with corrections. Escalate after 3 failures.

gates.name: Token Audit
gates.description: Scan all Figma nodes in the created component for hardcoded fills, strokes, radii, or font values.
passCriteria: Zero hardcoded hex colour values on any node
Zero raw px values on padding/gap/radius not bound to a variable
All text nodes use Zoho Puvi or Lato font family
gates.failAction: List every offending node and value. Replace with correct token. Re-run audit. Do not proceed to G3 until G2 passes.

gates.name: A11y Check
gates.description: Verify accessibility baseline for the component.
passCriteria: Text contrast ratio ≥ 4.5:1 against background (WCAG AA)
Interactive targets ≥ 44×44px (or 28px minimum for compact contexts)
All text layers have semantic label names (label--*)
gates.failAction: Output which criteria failed and which nodes are affected. Fix tokens or sizing. Re-run check.

qualityGates.publishRule: Never publish to Figma component library without explicit human approval. Output READY FOR REVIEW with a summary of all three gate results. Wait for user to confirm before publishing.

examples.description: Primary action button used across all surfaces for CTA actions.
Text input field for forms. Supports multiple states and optional right-side icon slot.
